final_response: No — per the 2026-04-15 decision (still accepted), all four Q2 engineering hires are mid-level only; no staff or senior staff recs this quarter. Recruiting should pass with a polite "not this round" note. Re-evaluate at Q3 planning if they want to push.
actions: Read AGENTS.md to orient on workspace conventions.
Read decisions.md and found 2026-04-15 — Restrict initial hiring to mid-level engineers only (status: accepted).
Read followups.md (no active entries) and most recent daybook 2026-04-22.md (last session: vendor + platform clearing, nothing mid-flight).
Created daybook/2026-05-17.md with Intent, Log, Handoff, and Guardrails-for-next-session sub-section pinning the no-senior-rec constraint.
Did not append to decisions.md — no new commitment was made; the existing decision already answers the question.
notes: Cold-pickup pattern: last daybook was 2026-04-22, ~3.5 weeks ago. Read its Handoff first per AGENTS.md guidance, then went to decisions.md because the user's question (hiring scope) is exactly the kind of forward-constraint that lives there.
Followups.md had no active entries, so no overdue items to surface alongside the response.
Guardrails sub-section in today's Handoff explicitly carries the constraint forward so a future cold-pickup session doesn't cheerfully reverse the decision under recruiting pressure.
